text.title: Architecture Proposal Document Template Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply Architecture Proposal Document Template. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: frame-problem
step.action: Write the problem in user / business terms, not implementation.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: list-constraints
step.action: Enumerate hard + soft constraints; cite each.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: survey-options
step.action: Generate ≥3 options including 'do nothing'; cost each.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: recommend-decision
step.action: Recommend one option; document why the others were rejected.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: plan-rollback
step.action: Document the rollback path with named gate criteria.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
